description.abstract: Testcase of classes nested in classes.
description.detailed: This is a reworked version of code from Castle Game Engine.

routine.name: AddSoundImportanceName
routine.declaration: procedure AddSoundImportanceName(const Name: string; Importance: Integer);

description.abstract: A list of sounds used by your program.
description.detailed: Each sound has a unique name, used to identify sound in the XML file and for SoundFromName function. At the beginning, this list always contains exactly one sound, empty. This is a special TSoundInfoBuffer that has Sound=nil and Name=''. It means "no sound" in many cases.

description.abstract: Sound that can be played -- actual sound with buffer, or an alias to it.

routine.name: ReadElement
routine.declaration: procedure ReadElement(const Element: TDOMElement; const AParentGroup: TSoundGroup; const BaseUrl: String; const ASoundEngine: TRepoSoundEngine); virtual;

description.abstract: Read a sound from XML element <sound> or <alias>.
Do some finalization once all sounds are known, and their names are known.

routine.name: FinalSound
routine.declaration: function FinalSound(const RecursionDepth: Cardinal): TSoundInfoBuffer; virtual; abstract;

description.abstract: Get the final TSoundInfoBuffer, resolving aliases.
Although we only support one instance of TSoundEngine, in SoundEngine, but it seems more future-proof to store in TSoundInfo own reference to TSoundEngine.
Unique sound name (including parent group names).
description.detailed: Empty for the special sound stNone = nil.

description.abstract: Like Name, but without parent group names.
description.detailed: Unique within the ParentGroup (not necessarily unique among all sounds).

description.abstract: A group (one among FSoundGroups, or Nil if not in any group).
Index of sound with given TSoundInfo.Name, or -1 if not found.
Sound that can be played, as an alias to a number of other TSoundInfo instances (an alias may lead to another alias, that's OK, as long as eventually it resolves into actual sound name).

routine.name: ReadElement
routine.declaration: procedure ReadElement(const Element: TDOMElement; const AParentGroup: TSoundGroup; const BaseUrl: String; const ASoundEngine: TRepoSoundEngine); override;

routine.name: FinalSound
routine.declaration: function FinalSound(const RecursionDepth: Cardinal): TSoundInfoBuffer; override;

description.abstract: Sound that can be played, with a buffer.

routine.name: ReadElement
routine.declaration: procedure ReadElement(const Element: TDOMElement; const AParentGroup: TSoundGroup; const BaseUrl: String; const ASoundEngine: TRepoSoundEngine); override;

routine.name: FinalSound
routine.declaration: function FinalSound(const RecursionDepth: Cardinal): TSoundInfoBuffer; override;

description.detailed: Absolute (including parent group URL parts). Always ends with slash.

description.abstract: A parent group (one among FSoundGroups, or Nil if not in any group).
Index of group with given TSoundGroup.Name, or -1 if not found.
